faq.q: How many GCC centers does Bentley Systems operate in India?
faq.a: Bentley Systems operates 1 active Global Capability Center site in India.

faq.q: How many people work at Bentley Systems's India GCCs?
faq.a: Bentley Systems's India centers employ in the 101 to 200 range. The exact aggregate and the headcount at each site are in the full profile.

faq.q: Who leads Bentley Systems's GCC in India?
faq.a: Bamboo Reports tracks 11 leaders at Bentley Systems's India centers, across Finance, IT and GCC leadership. Names and contact details open with a free account.
